plurals.name: album_check_album_limit_camera
plurals.item: You can only select %1$d files, anti-election after the operation.
You can only select %1$d file, anti-election after the operation.

plurals.name: album_check_image_limit_camera
plurals.item: You can only select %1$d images, anti-election after the operation.
You can only select %1$d image, anti-election after the operation.

plurals.name: album_check_video_limit_camera
plurals.item: You can only select %1$d videos, anti-election after the operation.
You can only select %1$d image, anti-election after the operation.
